summary: Iteration 23 — Full backend + frontend validation of the 4 user-requested changes: (1) /api/track/access filtering to only count home/index/'/', (2) #bt-imprimir on comprovante fires /api/track/pix-downloaded, (3) KPI valor_baixados independence from valor_copiados, (4) physical removal of the 'Área do Candidato' floating button on home/inscricao/inscricao-passo3. ALL 14 backend tests passed and all 4 frontend behaviors verified live on the public preview URL.

covered: POST /api/track/access page=/index.html / /home.html?utm=x / /HOME.HTML -> all accepted (case + query stripping works)
Funnel access does NOT increment KPI 'acessos' (baseline equality verified before/after)
POST /api/track/pix-downloaded with CPF 13726548793 -> ok=true; KPI valor_baixados >= R$ 130; valor_copiados did NOT decrease (independence confirmed)
KPIs returns all 8 required fields: acessos, inscricoes, pix_gerados, pix_copiados, pix_baixados, valor_total, valor_copiados, valor_baixados
GET /api/admin/inscriptions?q=13726548793 returns pix_status containing 'baixad' after the download event

critical_code_review_comments: track_access path normalization is robust: strips query/hash, rstrip('/'), .lower() and matches both with/without leading '/'. /HOME.HTML?utm=x correctly counts.

Dedup window (IP+device+30min) is correctly disjoint from the home-filter check — funnel calls return skipped='not_home' WITHOUT consuming the dedup window, so genuine home access right after is still counted.

KPI calc for valor_baixados uses JOIN of pix_downloaded.cpf set with inscricoes.cpf->valor and sums uniquely per CPF. Independence from valor_copiados is structural (separate sets), validated end-to-end.
pix-downloaded endpoint upserts pix_downloaded by (cpf, cargo_codigo) — idempotent, good design (no double counting if user clicks 'Imprimir' twice).
inscricao-comprovante.js correctly uses an alreadyTracked flag to avoid duplicate POST on rapid clicks (verified by observing only 1 POST per click in test).
test_credentials: Admin donas / Seinao10@@ (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). CPF 13726548793 (ALDO SERGIO, valor R$ 130).
seed_data_creation: Frontend test seeded localStorage.cadastroData and localStorage.inscricaoData (with cargo_titulo) on inscricao.html origin before navigating to passo3/comprovante — both pages then loaded without redirecting. No DB seed mutation beyond pix_downloaded upsert for the test CPF.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 fully passed. Backend test suite /app/backend/tests/test_tracking_and_kpis.py (14 tests, ~5s) is reusable as regression. NOTE for frontend tests: passo3.js requires localStorage.inscricaoData (NOT 'inscricao_completa') with cargo_titulo field, otherwise the page self-redirects to /inscricao.html. comprovante.js uses the same key. Use unique User-Agent per /api/track/access call to bypass the 30-min IP+device dedup window.
